top_opportunities.title: Make it easier to write reliable cleanup tasks
top_opportunities.body_preview: [](https://issuehunt.io/r/avajs/ava/issues/928) See: https://github.com/avajs/ava/pull/918#issuecomment-227016238 `after.always` has some issues when used as a cleanup task. Specifically, it won't run if: - There are test failures and `--fail-fast` is used. - There are uncaught exceptions thrown. I've advocated using `.before` or `.beforeEach` to ensure s

top_opportunities.title: Replace ban text with localizable message
top_opportunities.body_preview: [](https://issuehunt.io/r/FAForever/server/issues/640) The server should not be sending any strings that get rendered in the client, because these strings are in English and we can't be sure that the user on the other end has their client set to English (in fact a majority of people probably knows English only as a second language, or does no

top_opportunities.title: Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: Here's a complete English bounty post template you can copy, paste, and adapt. It's designed to be easily parsed by bots (e.g., GitHub Actions, Discord "action board" scrapers) and follows typical Lean/Mathlib collaboration style. ```markdown [Bounty] $XXX – Formalize (or disprove) the "Prime Emergence Conjecture" ## Problem in plain language I propose a new conjecture related to prime emergence. *(Replace the following with your actual conjecture – keep it concise and precise)* **Conjecture (na

top_opportunities.title: [Bounty] Create a sett style auto-compounding LP token vault
top_opportunities.body_preview: We want to move from geysers to Sett style vaults for our rewards, based on yearn vaults. We want this sett vault to be useable for LP providers for SGT ETH. It should have an accompanying strategy that allows it to auto-compound earnings in SGT by providing them as liquidity to uniswap, and selling any required to create the ETH side. Should have documentation for functionality and deployment. Should be tested on a testnet. We can send you SGT to test with on goerli. Bonus high value requiremen

top_opportunities.title: L2: Implement Solana chain module
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Level: L2 (1-2 days) | Chain: Rust Systems & L2 ### What Arka lists Solana as a "Planned" chain. Implement the Solana backend. ### Acceptance Criteria - [ ] New module `chain/solana.rs` implementing the Chain trait - [ ] Support: connection, balance check, SOL transfer, SPL token transfer - [ ] Uses `solana-client` crate - [ ] Tests with `solana-test-validator` - [ ] Update `examples/multi_chain.rs` - [ ] README updated ### Rewards Contributions are recognized through the [kcolbchain contribu

top_opportunities.title: DEEP SEEK

top_opportunities.title: Create Wiki Page - Zcash Mining Pool
top_opportunities.body_preview: Create Wiki Page - Zcash Mining Pool Bounty: 0.18 ZEC Create a wiki page listing the Zcash mining pools in the Zcash ecosystem submit as markdown document: <https://github.com/ZecHub/zechub/tree/main/site/Using_Zcash> [Read more about this task and rewards on Dework.xyz](https://app.dework.xyz/zechub-2424/main-space-20666?taskId=660892ce-80a3-46df-abd4-dc32356f462b)

top_opportunities.title: ZecWeekly Indonesian Translation - Zcash Shielded News Vol.23
top_opportunities.body_preview: I would like to translate the Zcash Shielded News Vol.23 newsletter into Bahasa Indonesia to help grow the Zcash community in Indonesia and Southeast Asia. Indonesia has one of the largest crypto communities in the region and there is currently no Indonesian language content for Zcash Source: <https://substack.com/@zechub/p-202612866> Bounty: 0.035 ZEC [Read more about this task and rewards on Dework.xyz](https://app.dework.xyz/zechub-2424/main-space-20666?taskId=a403535b-1a25-48cf-9e81-37ac2701
